description: Variable rename from single-letter to descriptive name
diff:
--- a/utils/math.py
+++ b/utils/math.py
@@ -3,6 +3,6 @@ def moving_average(values, window):
     result = []
     for i in range(len(values) - window + 1):
-        x = sum(values[i:i+window]) / window
-        result.append(x)
+        avg = sum(values[i:i+window]) / window
+        result.append(avg)
     return result
